# security-expert

> Security specialist perspective for the weekly review. Focuses on XSS/CSRF, authorization boundaries, input validation, secrets handling, and dependency CVEs.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/frontend/review-perspectives/security-expert
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/frontend/review-perspectives/security-expert
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
